div.head: The Consul at Nogales (Damm) to the Secretary of State
div.p: From Bursley, Guaymas. March 13, 5 p.m. For the Department.

Would the Department object to the exportation of fuel oil for an American-owned Mexican company operating light and water works Sonora, Sinaloa, provided that company makes suitable arrangements with the Mexican Government and revolutionists and with transportation companies? Please answer by telegraph via American Consulate at Nogales. Well authenticated reports indicate fighting at Mazatlan.
